title: T-073 — Shared BOM SSOT + released edit clone-on-write enforcement
prompt:
# T-073 — Shared BOM SSOT and released edit clone-on-write

Refactor/extend BOM services so `bom_headers`, `bom_lines`, and `bom_co_products` are the single shared BOM SSOT consumed by NPD, Technical, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance. NPD Builder creates initial BOM versions in this same model with source metadata; no shadow BOM model is introduced. Enforce released edit rule: editing `active` or `approved` BOM creates next draft version and never mutates the released row. Approval requires Technical permission and a passing RM usability report. RED first: tests for clone-on-write, no duplicate BOM tables/models, and factory-use rejection until Technical approval.

pipeline_inputs.details: Use existing BOM tables from T-002 if present; add source/review metadata through a safe migration only if missing. Approval flow is draft -> in_review -> approved -> active -> superseded. Production snapshots continue to use ADR-002 immutable snapshots. The service must expose typed decisions so UI can show exact blocking reason. This task is backend/API only. Use the shared release state contract from T-081 where available; otherwise implement a local adapter that can be replaced by T-081. BOM approval must be bundle-aware with factory_spec approval: callers must be able to request a combined FactorySpec+BOM release decision and receive atomic approve/reject semantics.
acceptance_criteria: Given NPD Builder creates an initial BOM, when it is saved, then it is stored in bom_headers/bom_lines with source npd_builder and status draft.
Given an active BOM v4, when a user edits header or lines, then BOM v5 draft is created and v4 remains byte-for-byte unchanged.
Given a BOM approval request with failing RM usability, then approval is rejected with the failing checks listed.
Given repository search for new BOM tables, then no module-specific NPD/Production BOM table is added by this task.

Given a FactorySpec+BOM bundle approval is requested, then BOM and factory_spec release decisions are evaluated together and partial release is rejected unless explicitly split by a Technical approver.
Given shared release status model exists, then BOM status mapping uses it without inventing a conflicting enum.
test_strategy: RED tests for active BOM immutability and NPD initial draft path.
Run: pnpm vitest run tests/actions/technical/bom-ssot.test.ts tests/db/bom-ssot-metadata.test.ts
risk_red_lines: Do not create a second BOM model.
Do not update active BOM rows in place.
Do not approve a BOM for factory use when the paired factory_spec is not approved_for_factory/released.
pipeline_inputs.description: Shared BOM SSOT backend contract with released edit clone-on-write and Technical approval guards.
